'''''Fell Defender''''' was the [[Chiss Star Destroyer]] that [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Jagged Fel]] was in command of during the [[Dark Nest Crisis]] and later, the [[Swarm War]]. It captured the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] above [[Tenupe]].

{{Ship-stub}}
